findings.problem: The chapter's core consequence (Zoe boundary repair) lands strongly in-scene, but the ending weight shifts to a long home-control reprise, so the friendship consequence is reduced to a brief late text exchange instead of a fully dramatized carry-forward action.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten repeated audit beats in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:323-347 and use the recovered space in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:367-431 to stage one explicit behavioral carry-forward from Zoe's boundary scene (set up at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:209-226), not just a reactive aftermath text.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:367-431, Anika takes one observable boundary action learned from Zoe before the chapter closes (spoken boundary, proactive outreach, or refusal pattern linked to lines 209-226); FAIL if the Zoe consequence remains only a short end-text after the father conflict.

findings.problem: Anika's stress mode is repeatedly rendered through explicit math/minute accounting. Because this token set appears in nearly every major beat, the pattern starts to feel mechanically imported from the stress-tell profile rather than dynamically evolving in-scene.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:3-9, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:125-129, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:253-257, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:433-434, keep only the most narratively necessary numeric beat and replace the others with non-numeric embodied pressure signals (breath, muscle guarding, compulsive gesture, sensory trigger tied to debt/grief stakes).
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each cited beat contains at least one non-numeric stress cue and no beat contains more than one explicit time/calorie/rep calculation; FAIL if the revised passage still stacks multiple explicit calculations in each of those beats.

findings.problem: The sentence construction 'She could hear ...' appears three times. Crossing the twice-only threshold turns a useful sensory entry into a detectable prose tic.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise at least one of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:41, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:61, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:333 so the auditory perception is conveyed with a different syntactic shape (for example, external sound pressure, intrusive quoted memory, or physical vibration language).
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the exact stem 'She could hear' appears no more than twice across the chapter and all three cited moments read as distinct sensory constructions; FAIL if all three retain the same stem-driven setup.

summary: Chapter 07 is emotionally legible, tense-consistent, and continuity-consistent, with strong voice separation between Anika, Zoe, and Ravi and no detectable fade-to-black intimacy or major sanitization drift. It still fails this review pass on Booker/craft/prose because ending-weight distribution weakens the chapter-specific consequence and repeated stress/prose templates begin to feel mechanical.
